_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Single ventricle physiology with increase pulmonary blood flow and will require single ventricular pathway

preauth.label: Clinical notes including clinical assessment, indication of procedure, implant requirement, and planned line of management

claim.label: Post procedure stills of ECHO with report

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes contain all vitals, detailed history, symptoms, signs, physical examination, indication for procedure, planned line of treatment, and advice for admission?
Was the Echo/ Doppler report suggestive of diagnosis?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and treatment details?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Does the Post procedure still of ECHO show repair of the defect?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Clinical assessment and Echo/Doppler report not supportive of diagnosis or not indicative of surgery.
Mandatory clinical notes missing or incomplete at pre-authorization, lacking essential details like indication or planned management.
Mandatory Echo/Doppler report missing at pre-authorization or not adequately documenting the diagnosis.
Missing post-procedure ECHO stills or report, or report does not confirm repair of the defect at claim stage.
Implant details barcode/invoice not submitted at claim stage, preventing verification of implant used.
Discharge summary missing or incomplete, or lacking essential follow-up advice at claim stage.

clinical_key_pointers: Complex congenital cyanotic heart disease where it is desirable to increase intracardiac mixing and reduce pulmonary blood flow.
